archive/

`cad_rms_data_quality/consolidate_cad_2019_2026.py` - Verify config loading

It confirms that you have a "split" state: high-quality structural work is present in the `CAD/`, `RMS/`, and `CAD_RMS/` directories, but the "mess" you identified earlier still exists in the root-level `unified_data_dictionary/` folder...
Gemini raised some valid points about precision that will help the AI agent avoid confusion.
column in the CAD export.
